notes: No client recovery layer, no overlay, no floating hints.
CC7.3.0 external link button produced MAX confirmation dialog, so it is not acceptable for product UX.
CC7.3.1 sets ADMINKIT_USE_OPEN_APP_BUTTON=1 inside the loader when no Northflank env override is present, restoring native open_app buttons.
Existing Post 30 button may remain external until repatched; new posts after this deploy should use native comment button again.
Next architectural step: postSnapshot rendering inside comments using stored text/media/format/link, while keeping native MAX open_app.
